TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-class_sinay

S.FORM: ci Sinay ku angnan aku tu nu pangcah.
S.TRANSL: 我阿美族名字叫做Sinay。
My Amis name is Sinay.

S.FORM: pakaini i Maibul kuyni u ma kamu nu maku u canan a sa.
S.TRANSL: 要講的是馬立雲的事。
What I am going to talk about is about Maibul.

S.FORM: i pakaini ay i sapunis mamin sa tu milangec tuyuni palalud.
S.TRANSL: 捕鳥祭是在夏天收割之後。
The hunting festival started after harvest in summer.

S.FORM: paanip tu tuyu u nipasaba i pituay a bulad.
S.TRANSL: 在七月插第二期的秧。
People transplanted the second-season rice seedlings in July.

S.FORM: mamin sa tu miniwanyu kya.
S.TRANSL: (人們)用手除草。
(People) weeded.

S.FORM: masabalucu’ tu nuyni u babalaki atu u kapah kuyni u sakalimulak tuyni u misapunis.
S.TRANSL: 老人家決定要和年輕人慶祝這個捕鳥季的慶典。
The senior citizens decided to celebrate hunting festival with young people.

S.FORM: sisa tatenga’ izaw tu kuyni u kamu nu babalaki nikasaupu.
S.TRANSL: 所以有老人在說要集合了。
Therefore, old people said it is time to gather together.

S.FORM: tuyni u maketun tu kuyni u kamu.
S.TRANSL: 這已經決定了。
This has been decided.

S.FORM: a yaan henay mihiya sapunis malingatu i sa izaw tu.
S.TRANSL: 捕鳥祭要何時開始？
When would the hunting festival start?

S.FORM: kuyu nipibihkac nu ni u pikilumaluma’an nuyni nu wawa tuyu tatamaan.
S.TRANSL: 家家戶戶的男孩都會射鳥。
Every boy would shoot birds.

S.FORM: mahiza ay kiza u nu luluma’ kuyni.
S.TRANSL: 家庭的捕鳥祭就是這樣。
This is the hunting festival for family.

S.FORM: mibihkac sa tu nuyu kapulungan sa.
S.TRANSL: 捕鳥祭是大家的。
The hunting festival is for our tribe.

S.FORM: a hican anu cacay a demiad anu tusaay a demiad nayi ku wantan tuyni.
S.TRANSL: 不確定是一天或二天。
It was not clear whether it is one day or two days.

S.FORM: maketun anu tusa a demiad kuyu nipibihkac sa tusa a demiad.
S.TRANSL: 決定要捕鳥二天就二天。
If it was decided for two days, it would be two days.

S.FORM: anu tuluan sa tulu a demiad a mahiza.
S.TRANSL: 說三天的話就是三天。
If it would be three days, it would be in this way.

S.FORM: saupu han ku ayam tuyza u kakalabian sa.
S.TRANSL: 收集晚餐要吃的鳥。
(People) collected birds for dinner.

S.FORM: tuduh han mamin mituduh sa singa’ han henay kuyni sa.
S.TRANSL: 烤完之後擱置在一邊。
It was put aside after it was burned.

S.FORM: E pahalhalen nuyu tatayna a maduh.
S.TRANSL: 女性在摏米。
Women were pounding.

S.FORM: mitelac sangelac kuyni u panay mahiza ay kiza.
S.TRANSL: 糯米就很白了。
Then the glutinous rice became white.

S.FORM: sahakhak han tu talik han tu mihiya mitalik nuyni u tatayna kuyza u tunuz sa uyza ay kuyu malusakalahuk.
S.TRANSL: 女性煮糯米飯並將其把打成麻糬成午餐。
Women cooked glutinous rice and made it into rice cakes as lunch.

S.FORM: anu tabaki heni sapela’en anu sangelac sa anu malasepad malaenem ku nipipela’ ku nicikcik mihiza ay kiza sa.
S.TRANSL: 大的就切一切，不然就切成四份，切成六份。
(We would) cut it if it was big, or cut it half, into four pieces or six pieces.

S.FORM: uyu Pulo’ Pulo’ sanaden kuyu nisalami’an mihiza ay kiza u kabi ku kabi.
S.TRANSL: 鳥、煮的菜和湯分開放。
(They) separate birds from the cooked vegetables and soup.

S.FORM: anu patahkal i wakung i yu u ayam u ayam han sa.
S.TRANSL: 用碗公裝鳥。
(They) put birds in a big bowl.

S.FORM: pakilac han kuyni u hiya u babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣分給老人家。
(They) gave (birds) to senior citizens in this way.

S.FORM: anu simatulu anu simalima.
S.TRANSL: 分三個或五個給老人家。
Every senior citizens had three or five.

S.FORM: nayi’ ku wantan nu i tawya ay u iza pibihkac.
S.TRANSL: 那時候沒有一定分法。
It was uncertain how it was distributed.

S.FORM: nikaw izaw nu ayam kuyni u tapeng anu yadah ku ayam kya yadah kuyni u u kilac nu payteked.
S.TRANSL: 如果鳥很多的話，那分給每個人的也很多。
If there were many birds, every one could have more.

S.FORM: u ayam ku pimelawen tya tusa anu simalacacay mahiza ay.
S.TRANSL: 小孩分兩個或一人一個。
Every child had one or two.

S.FORM: anu tada mahinac kya cikciken mahiza ay kiza ku nika u.
S.TRANSL: 不夠的話就再切。
If it was deficient, people would cut more.

S.FORM: kakawaw nu ini u Maibul.
S.TRANSL: 馬立雲的事情就是這樣。
Those were things in Maibul.

S.FORM: nihan nu maku u ta'pang nu ini u sapunis hananay sa.
S.TRANSL: 這就是所謂的捕鳥祭的意義。
This is so called hunting festival.

S.FORM: cacay a mihiza kina cacay ya hican u ini u hiya.
S.TRANSL: 一年一次或有時候。
Once a year or sometimes

S.FORM: u selal kuyza u u tapang tu mahini ay uyza han tu u wawa malaluk ay misikaway mi miani tuyni u babalaki bakiaw amay uyu nikunuyan isu nimukuan isu kaku ay ku mimuku ay.
S.TRANSL: 勤快的小孩跟老人家說你背的你扛的都讓我來扛。
To the senior citizens, the diligent children said that we would help you carry what you carried.

S.FORM: kaku ay kuyu sikaway mimuku tu yu balas ay nu misu u babalaki.
S.TRANSL: 老人家您拿的東西讓我背讓我扛。
I would help you carry what you carried.

S.FORM: i mamelaw nu babalaki anu i tawya i pisapunisan sa E mimelaw kuyni u babalaki uyni kuyni u sasangelacay a tunuzan sa.
S.TRANSL: 老人家在捕鳥祭時會看最白的麻糬。
The senior citizens would look at the whitest rice cake.

S.FORM: tatenga’ u sangelacay a tunuz sa a sipabeli’ i tini babalaki kuyni u sangelacay a tunuz.
S.TRANSL: 白色的麻糬是要給這裡老人家的。
The pieces of white rice cake were given to the senior citizens.

S.FORM: nima ay anu sa sa.
S.TRANSL: 有人問是誰的。
Someone asked, “whose is this?”

S.FORM: anu siwantan tu hiya u ngangan kya i tatenga’ a sikawlah kuyza ya na mi…satunuzay tuyu sangelacay.
S.TRANSL: 如果確定名字的話，麻糬做的很白的人會有獎品。
If (the senior citizens) knew the name, the people who made the whitest rice cake would be awarded.

S.FORM: mahiya ay kiza saka uyni han tu u ayam sa.
S.TRANSL: 獎品就是鳥。
The award was the birds.

S.FORM: E ini ku babalaki ya malalukay a kapah cima ay cima ay matineng kuyni u babalaki a ma te te te.
S.TRANSL: 老人知道誰是最勤勞的年輕人。
The senior citizens knew the most diligent young people.

S.FORM: cay tu mamelaw ay nu niza tuyu u malalukay a sEnEng sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到的勤勞的年輕人。
They saw diligent young people.

S.FORM: uyu u ayam u pulupulu’ uyu tikulac kuyza u si ku si sipakawlah tuyu u malalukay mahiza i kiza.
S.TRANSL: pulu-pulu’ 和 tikulac當作勤勞年輕人的獎品。
pulu-pulu’and tikulac were the award for diligent people.

S.FORM: u sakalahuk sa u tunuz mamin.
S.TRANSL: 中餐皆是麻糬。
The lunch was rice cake.

S.FORM: anu cay kataneng kuyni u hak ku tunuz kya a u hakhak.
S.TRANSL: 如果麻糬不夠，就用糯米飯。
If rice cake is insufficient, they will eat glutinous rice.

S.FORM: mahiza ay kiza kuyni u sakalahuk.
S.TRANSL: 這就是午餐。
This was lunch.

S.FORM: uyni han tu malaluk ay sa maawaw ku nganga sa.
S.TRANSL: 至於那個勤勞的人，他名字被叫到。
As for the diligent worker, his name was called.

S.FORM: maduba’ tu miala tuyni u nipabeli’ nipasisi nu hiya pakilac nuyni u nu sEnEng tuyni u babalaki sa.
S.TRANSL: 跑去拿老人分給年輕人的(獎品)。
(They) ran to receive the award that senior citizens gave to the young people.

S.FORM: u namuh nu babalaki mahiza ay kiza.
S.TRANSL: 老人家一高興，就會這樣。
Senior citizens would do this when they felt happy.

S.FORM: han nu maku kuni ka u kamu.
S.TRANSL: 這就是我要講的。
This was what I wanted to say.

S.FORM: tatenga’ uyni han tu u hiya sa u malalukay aca nuyni u nu tatayna ya hican.
S.TRANSL: 那勤勞的女性又該如何？
How about the diligent women?

S.FORM: izaw ku sausi nu babalaki tuyni u malusapakawlah tuyni u hiya.
S.TRANSL: 老人家也有打算給勤勞的婦女獎品。
Senior citizens also planed to award diligent women.

S.FORM: u kawlah sa izaw tu.
S.TRANSL: 有獎品的。
There were awards.

S.FORM: anu uyni u sabun anu u canan.
S.TRANSL: 可以是肥皂或是其他東西。
It could be soap or something else.

S.FORM: anu pakaini ay nu tatayna sa nu tatayna kuni tatayna a malukawlah.
S.TRANSL: 若是婦女的獎品就歸女人。
If they were women’s awards, they belonged to women.

S.FORM: anu ayam ay sa u tatama ay u.
S.TRANSL: 鳥都是男生的。
Birds belonged to men.

S.FORM: mikelec ay tuyni u hiya matineng ay sakii tini i niyazu’.
S.TRANSL: 能夠讓部落團結
It united our tribe.

S.FORM: mihiya misimaw ay tu niyazu’ malakapah pala tamtaw tuyni u kapah mamin tuyni u babalaki tuyni nu niyazu’ anu sa sa.
S.TRANSL: 如果這樣的話，在部落老人家讓年輕人都能成為人才。
In this way, senior citizens made the young people in the tribe outstanding.

S.FORM: uyni kuyu matatungus ay sa tatenga’ anu matatungus tu kuyu u mihcaan a pipili’anan sa mipili’ tu tuyni u tutung ay nu tumuk.
S.TRANSL: 到了被選的合適年齡，就會被選為頭目。
When the young people were of proper age, one of them would be selected as leader.

S.FORM: tutung ay tuyni u kucyu.
S.TRANSL: 就像校長。
It is like principal.

S.FORM: u i lisin hananay tuyni u sapunis sa.
S.TRANSL: 這個所謂的捕鳥祭。
This is so called hunting festival.

S.FORM: tatenga’ cacay a mihca kina cacay.
S.TRANSL: 的確，一年一次。
Indeed, it is once in a year.

S.FORM: a hican i tawya maala ku tulutulu anu lima’ a demiad mahiza.
S.TRANSL: 在那時會用到三天甚至五天 就這樣。
At that time, it took three or five days. That’s it.

S.FORM: ayza sa cacay tu a demiad.
S.TRANSL: 現在只有一天。
It is one day now.

S.FORM: a hican u mikuli ay tu amin mahini ku sausi sa.
S.TRANSL: 因為大家都去工作。
It is because every one had to work.

S.FORM: nayay ku tudung nu hiya kutungus nu niyam u Maibul tuyni u nu Sakizaya kuyni kumud hananay mibuting nayay.
S.TRANSL: 我們馬立雲的Sakizaya人沒有仿效大家一起去捕魚的祭典。
We Sakizaya people did not imitate others’ fishing festival.

S.FORM: u ayam dada mahiza ay kiza anu yadah kuyni u ayam sa yadah ay kuyni u.
S.TRANSL: 只有鳥，就這樣; 如果鳥很多就也很多。
We only hunt birds; if there were many bird, we would hunt many.

S.FORM: sapabeli’ tuyni u babalaki sapakan mahiza ay.
S.TRANSL: 如果鳥很多要給老人家吃的也很多。
If there were many birds, senior citizens could eat more.

S.FORM: han ha nu maku uyni u hiya.
S.TRANSL: 我就這樣講。
I would say this.

S.FORM: u u selal misanga tu selal tulu a mihca kina cacay.
S.TRANSL: 三年一次安排年齡階級。
Every three years, people rank based on their age.

S.FORM: anu tusa a mihca kina cacay misanga tuyni u selal uyni u selal sa.
S.TRANSL: 二年一次安排年齡階級。
Or people rank every two years.

S.FORM: tatenga’ cima kuyni u tazikuz ay nu hiya nuyni u wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩誰會往後呢?
Would children retreat?

S.FORM: nayay ku tazikuz ay sa.
S.TRANSL: 沒有人往後。
Nobody would retreat.

S.FORM: sa tu mabilil ay malaluk ay tuyni u kawaw.
S.TRANSL: 全部認真勤勞地工作。
Every one worked diligently.

S.FORM: tuyni u sakai tini nu babalaki misikaway.
S.TRANSL: 那是老人家所背負的責任。
Senior citizens united the young people.

S.FORM: nihan han nu maku kuyni u kamu hatizaay kina kamu nu maku.
S.TRANSL: 我的話就講到這。
This is what I would say.
